merge_requests.title: Land shared/failure-simulation/ package — manifest + KNOB accessor + assertKnown + schema
merge_requests.deliverable_summary: Stand up the shared/failure-simulation/ workspace package per ADR-036. Land package.json, manifest.ts (6 entries with legacyAlias bridge per ADR-038), manifest.schema.ts (Zod + branded KnobCanonicalName), registry.ts (shouldInject + detectUnknownSignals stubs, throwing for unknown names), the KNOB const accessor, and assertKnown helper. The registry package compiles and the manifest schema rejects malformed entries. No production callsites are migrated yet — phase-1 migration is MR-4. The CI lint drift-check script lands here too so MR-1 itself is enforceable.
exit_criteria: shared/failure-simulation/ exists and is built by Bazel
MR-1 unskipped scenarios + CA-1 + CA-2 turn GREEN
All other scenarios remain RED (registry has no gate / audit / migration yet)

merge_requests.title: Land gate composition + probe + composition-root wiring + inspection-probe conditional registration
merge_requests.deliverable_summary: Land gate.ts (evalGate + probe + parseBool + readTier) per ADR-035 and component-design.md. Wire probe() into ui-state/index.ts and agent/index.ts composition roots; both call probe() exactly once at startup before any route or actor is bound. Land agent/lib/inspection/ with registerInspectionRoutes(app, verdict) per ADR-036; conditional registration based on gate verdict (404 when disabled, route absent). Update shouldInject to consult the cached verdict. Audit emitter for gate events + rejected/fired stub (full audit lands in MR-3).
exit_criteria: MR-2 unskipped scenarios + CA-3 + CA-4 + CA-7 + CA-9 turn GREEN
Production-safety matrix (CA-9, 9 cases) is fully GREEN

merge_requests.title: Land structured audit emitter + correlation-id propagation across actor boundary
merge_requests.deliverable_summary: Land audit.ts per ADR-037: discriminated-union AuditEvent types (fired/rejected/unknown/gate.enabled/gate.disabled/config.deprecated), one-line JSON-on-stdout emission, OTel-aligned envelope (event.name, service.name, timestamp, environment.tier, correlation_id). Wire emission into shouldInject (fired + rejected) and detectUnknownSignals (unknown). Thread correlationId through actor input per ADR-028 — add the field to actor input schemas where missing.
exit_criteria: All 5 US-CONSOL-3 scenarios + CA-5 + CA-6 turn GREEN
Every audit event is one line of valid JSON conforming to ADR-037 schema
Correlation id propagates from HTTP request through XState actor to audit envelope

merge_requests.title: Migrate the 6 existing knob callsites to the registry — phase 1 (adapter, wire-identical)
scenarios_unskipped: test_journey_invariants_fsc.py::test_all_six_knobs_remain_functional_after_every_story_lands (partial — header + body knobs only, event knobs await MR-5)
merge_requests.deliverable_summary: Phase-1 of US-CONSOL-4 migration. Rewrite each of the 6 knob callsites in ui-state/index.ts, project-context.ts, session-chat.ts, login-and-org-setup.ts, agent/index.ts, agent/lib/chat/requestLog.ts to call shouldInject(KNOB.xxx, ctx) per component-design.md. Firing-path wire contract is byte-identical pre-vs-post — the legacyAlias entries in the manifest bridge the event/body-field names until MR-5. No test changes in this MR (Scenario 2 invariant). Per-knob atomic commits; each commit's existing acceptance suite (project-and-chat-session-management/) runs GREEN at HEAD.
exit_criteria: Existing acceptance suite (project-and-chat-session-management/) passes at every commit of MR-4
Each migration commit modifies <=8 files (atomic-commit invariant)

merge_requests.title: Phase-2 vocabulary cleanup — drop harness_ prefix from events + body field, deprecate NWAVE_HARNESS_KNOBS
scenarios_unskipped: test_journey_invariants_fsc.py::test_all_six_knobs_remain_functional_after_every_story_lands (fully — event knobs now use canonical names)
merge_requests.deliverable_summary: Phase-2 of US-CONSOL-4 — vocabulary cleanup. Atomic rename commits, each touching production source AND affected acceptance fixtures: __harness_force_failure__ -> __force_failure__; __harness_expire_token__ -> __expire_token__; harness_force_reissue_failures body field -> force_reissue_failures. Drop the legacyAlias entries from manifest.ts. Land the failure-simulation.config.deprecated event when NWAVE_HARNESS_KNOBS is read (legacy path), with the DELIVER-decided removal.target_release semver string. HTTP X-Force-* headers are NOT renamed (ADR-038).
exit_criteria: No __harness_*, harness_force_reissue_failures in tree (verified by git grep)
NWAVE_HARNESS_KNOBS still readable, emits config.deprecated event with semver-shaped removal.target_release
Existing project-and-chat-session-management/ suite still GREEN at HEAD of every rename commit

known_unknowns_handed_off_to_deliver.resolution_in_distill: Tests assert SEMVER_REGEX shape only; exact string is DELIVER's call

known_unknowns_handed_off_to_deliver.topic: stdout-capture helper choice (capsys vs dedicated fixture vs monkeypatch sys.stdout)
known_unknowns_handed_off_to_deliver.resolution_in_distill: Driven by subprocess.run() with text=True; parse stdout line-by-line via _parse_jsonl_events. No pytest capture mechanism needed because the registry runs in a child node process.

known_unknowns_handed_off_to_deliver.topic: detectUnknownSignals middleware placement order in ui-state and agent
known_unknowns_handed_off_to_deliver.resolution_in_distill: Tests call detectUnknownSignals directly from a node subprocess; do not depend on middleware position. DELIVER picks the Hono middleware insertion point.

iron_rule_reminder: Tests in this suite are RED at handoff. DELIVER's job is to land production code that turns them GREEN. NEVER modify a failing test to make it pass. If a test is wrong, revert and escalate.
